title: CVE-2026-33505 - Ory Keto has a SQL injection via forged pagination tokens

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-33505 - Ory Keto has a SQL injection via forged pag
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/27
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*secrets.pagination*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
